newRecording.title: Return to Recorder
newRecording.description: Your current session has been saved.

errors.unableToDetermineSourcePath: Unable to determine source video path
errors.exportBackgroundLoadFailed: Export failed: could not load background image ({{url}})

recording.cameraBlocked: Camera access is blocked. Enable it in system settings to use the webcam.
recording.systemAudioUnavailable: System audio not available. Recording without system audio.
recording.microphoneDenied: Microphone access denied. Recording will continue without audio.
recording.cameraDenied: Camera access denied. Recording will continue without webcam.
recording.permissionDenied: Recording permission denied. Please allow screen recording.
recording.accessibilityAllowAndRetry: Allow Accessibility access for OpenScreen, then press record again to start the countdown.

autoCaptions.dialogDescription: Choose roughly how many words each caption shows at once. Timing is spread across the words in that phrase.
autoCaptions.loadingModel: Loading speech model (first use downloads ~75 MB)…
autoCaptions.busy: Caption generation is already in progress.
autoCaptions.noAudio: This video has no usable audio to transcribe.
autoCaptions.truncated: Only the first {{minutes}} minutes were transcribed.

emptyState.title: No project open
emptyState.description: Create a new project or open an existing one.
emptyState.titleHasAsset: Add a video to get started
emptyState.descriptionHasAsset: Import a recording to begin editing.
emptyState.supportedFormats: Supported formats: MP4, MOV, WebM, MKV, AVI, M4V, WMV
emptyState.dragDropHint: or drag & drop a .openscreen project file here

dropErrors.unsupportedFormatMessage: Only .openscreen project files can be dropped here. To import a video file, use the "Import Video File…" button on this screen.
dropErrors.couldNotOpenMessage: The project file could not be opened. The video it references may have been moved or deleted.

regionClipboard.nothingToCopy: Select a region to copy its attributes

rec.turnOnCameraHint: Turn on the camera for a live preview
rec.startRecordingHint: Opens the recording widget and closes this editor window.

mediaStage.dragHint: Drag a clip onto the timeline below to add it
mediaStage.emptyHint: No media yet — import a recording to get started.
mediaStage.notGeneratedHint: Not generated yet — pick a language and click regenerate.
mediaStage.generationFailedHint: Generation failed — pick a language and regenerate.

exportDialog.title: Export
exportDialog.subtitle: Render the timeline to a file
exportDialog.codecMaySupportVary: May not be supported by every system encoder
exportDialog.pickFormatAndExport: Pick a format and press Export to start.

inspector.trimHiddenDuration: {{duration}}s of source media hidden from the edited timeline.
inspector.captionsDescription: Generate word-timed captions from the transcript and drop them onto the timeline.
inspector.cropDescription: Reframe the recording — pick an aspect ratio and zoom into the region you want to keep.

leftPanel.emptyHint: No media in this project yet. Import a video below.

chat.fetchModelsFailed: Couldn't fetch live models ({{error}}); open provider settings to type a model id manually.
chat.noModelsAvailable: No models available from this provider.
chat.applyEditsFailed: Could not apply the agent's edits
chat.rewoundSuccess: Rewound to the start of that message
chat.notEnoughHistory: Not enough history to compact yet.
chat.addSkipRangeOrderError: endSec must be greater than startSec.
chat.emptyState: No messages yet. Ask the agent to cut silences, tighten pauses, or add captions.
chat.rewindConfirmBody: The agent's edits and follow-up turns after this point get rolled back. Project, conversation, and agent state will be restored.

newProjectDialog.title: New project
newProjectDialog.subtitle: Choose a starting point and give it a name

openProjectDialog.title: Open project
openProjectDialog.subtitle: Pick up an existing project or browse your files

insertSourceDialog.title: Insert source
insertSourceDialog.subtitle: Where to place "{{assetLabel}}" on the timeline?
insertSourceDialog.addBeforeDesc: Insert the whole source before the target clip.
insertSourceDialog.addAfterDesc: Insert the whole source after the target clip.
insertSourceDialog.splitDesc: Split the target clip at the drop point and insert the source in between.

cropDialog.subtitle: Drag the region or its handles to adjust the crop area
